# orgSecretsDel

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for orgSecretsDel

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useOrgSecretsDelMutation(); mutate({ input: { ownerId: '<UUID>', secretName: '<String>', namespaceId: '<UUID>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useOrgSecretsDelMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useOrgSecretsDelMutation();
mutate({ input: { ownerId: '<UUID>', secretName: '<String>', namespaceId: '<UUID>' } });
```
